# hyperfluid_backup_target (Data Source)

Look up an existing backup target by name within an environment.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "hyperfluid_env" "default" {
  name = "default"
}

data "hyperfluid_backup_target" "offsite" {
  env  = data.hyperfluid_env.default.id
  name = "offsite"
}

output "backup_endpoint" {
  value = data.hyperfluid_backup_target.offsite.endpoint_url
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `env` (String) Environment id the target belongs to.
- `name` (String) Backup target name.

### Read-Only

- `access_key_secret_name` (String) Secret holding the S3 access key id.
- `description` (String) Free-form description.
- `destination_path` (String) Bucket + prefix backups are stored under.
- `endpoint_url` (String) S3-compatible endpoint URL.
- `id` (String) Backup target id.
- `insecure` (Boolean) Whether TLS verification is skipped.
- `phase` (String) Current lifecycle phase.
- `secret_access_key_secret_name` (String) Secret holding the S3 secret access key.
- `slug` (String) Derived slug.
- `tags` (List of String) User-defined tags.
